projects.title: Geri-Action
projects.pageLogline: Once the world's greatest superspy, Agent M is now old and decades past her prime. Now she takes on a new mission: using her old skills to escape her elderly nursing home, at any cost.
projects.credits:
Directed & Written by Jack Carlsen · Loyola Marymount University
Starring Cameron Quinn · Rachael DeBoer · Kennedy Porter · Adam Kezele
projects.blurb: A retired superspy breaks out of her nursing home! A live-action x 2D animation hybrid proof of concept.

projects.title: Revelations
projects.pageLogline: A surreal vision of Heaven and Earth, where angels work a vast office space and keep themselves quarantined from the sinful humans below. When the angel Emmanuel goes missing, his angelic manager Michael must descend to Earth to bring him back before they are both corrupted by the world they find there.
projects.credits:
Directed & Written by Jack Carlsen · Loyola Marymount University
Starring Lawrence Lacey · Jesse Shafroth · John Klenk · Trinity Medina
projects.blurb: Heaven is an office. Earth is the problem.

projects.title: Invalid Opinion
projects.pageLogline: When a self-proclaimed expert Redditor stumbles on a distasteful meme, he does what any genius would: fires up his most advanced AI tech to engineer the perfect witty comeback. A fast, funny send-up of online self-importance, where Tony Stonk is never in doubt and never more wrong.
projects.credits:
Created by Jack Carlsen
Starring Iago Lashua · Nick Wittcoff
Director of Photography Jash Shah · Sound Jacob Gensheimer
projects.blurb: A fast, funny short about a guy who is always right.

projects.title: More to come...
projects.blurb: New worlds are in the works.
